Who I Am

Passion for Finance

To join in a reputed organization where I will be able to contribute my professional knowledge and experience in managing business and finance with ample opportunity to learn and develop my career in the field of Finance, Accounting, Internal Control and Compliance, Audit and Management.

My journey has been shaped by enthusiasm, perseverance, hard work, ethics, sincerity and honesty — values that guide every professional engagement I undertake.

What I Do

Areas of Expertise

📊
Auditing & Assurance
Statutory audit, performance audit, internal control assessment and management audit across diverse industries.
🧾
Taxation
Income Tax (Act 2023), VAT & SD Act 2012, Customs Duty, TDS/VDS compliance, ITP registered practitioner.
📈
Financial Reporting
Preparation of financial statements per IAS 1, trial balance, bank reconciliation, books of accounts.
💼
Management Consultancy
Budgetary control, financial analysis, performance reporting and management advisory services.
🔎
Assets Valuation
Independent valuation of fixed assets, inventory audits, and property management reviews.
💻
Accounting Systems
Tally ERP 9, IAS/IFRS compliance, accounting information system design and implementation.
Auditing & Assurance90%
